{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113594533DFE4D13120C957497E"}"},"total":4628},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7104304211436798757","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很久没看到这样的作品了，故事代入感很强，而且每个故事背后发人深思的内涵！对照当下复杂多变的社会环境，确实很有感触，加油加油加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1654099908,"group_id":"7094837436492024866","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随心就好……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzWhN67teY1E4M9Je0d8+UPwP6NspW6L6odFaLEDhHV1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bf31ad8308974574b4061ccee61c9efd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617342&x-signature=gv675TMuxEKmwdWnA7XoyhbGknI%3D","user_id":"1909232720685950","user_name":"木瓜@汤圆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1909232720685950","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1738411330,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7094837436492024866","book_info":{"abstract":"（75个高能烧脑案。刑警队长和心理师联手破案，缉拿人心的怪物。悬疑+推理+心理师+单元破案+连环杀人+高智商犯罪+复仇计划+奇闻怪录+最佳拍档+悬疑轻恐+胆小可入）
“我杀人了。”
一个女孩来自首，声称自己杀了人。
奇怪的是，尸体却不翼而飞。
消失的尸体……老房中的神秘生物……火灾现场的诡异笑容……疯人院的疯言疯语……镇妖塔下的秘密……反社会人格的高智商犯罪……
       刑警队长题安和心理师赵耀联手带你去破案现场，探究幽微的人性，缉拿人心中的怪物……
       一场声势浩大的真相正在慢慢显露……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/89be5dda5de6c7b9bf02b7a7a3ef2fbb","author":"琉璃栾华","author_id":"","book_id":"7094837436492024866","book_name":"杀人真相","book_short_name":"黑白调","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":747,"name":"女频悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=747&name=女频悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1169,"name":"悬疑恋爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1169&name=悬疑恋爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7094913069305823782","read_count":"31588","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"614260"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"297","tags":"女频悬疑,悬疑恋爱,推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/35e195e70e6a5c6785b345111efd813f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256785&x-signature=rh1giWbj2mxsAwn0GtMSnLqopZ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"435062119075399","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.436187e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113594533DFE4D13120C957497E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":56,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9436,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":81985},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1654177913,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7323002876538962707","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"属于刑侦题材，又超越了普通破案，将犯罪，人性，现实完美揉合，故事节奏紧凑，无尿点，案情扑朔迷离，面对罪恶，有正义执法时的快意恩仇，也有蚍蜉撼树的苍白无力，正义不在人间，而在人心中，他们心怀正义，不忘初心，像一道光，照耀在人间。非常好的一部小说，完全可以拍成剧版，可以想象如果颜值和演技过关，题安和赵耀这对CP一定大火！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705020857,"group_id":"7094837436492024866","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9WnqNGUGAtzUmActssniFk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"63770072622","user_name":"本命大宝剑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"63770072622","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1719847438,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7094837436492024866","book_info":{"abstract":"（75个高能烧脑案。刑警队长和心理师联手破案，缉拿人心的怪物。悬疑+推理+心理师+单元破案+连环杀人+高智商犯罪+复仇计划+奇闻怪录+最佳拍档+悬疑轻恐+胆小可入）
